title: nicipe pilosa
side_effects: Nicipe pilosa can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing liver damage, nausea, and stomach ulcers due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. Prolonged use can lead to headaches, dizziness, and fatigue, making it crucial to follow proper dosages and preparation methods. In severe cases, improper use can cause kidney failure, seizures, and even death. Additionally, allergic reactions such as rashes, itching, and swelling may occur in sensitive individuals.
